name: DSMP Villains
description:
A bot based off the dream smp, But as villains >:) I know that there might be some people saying “HECK NO NOT A DREAM SMP STAN” but your here so it doesn’t matter :> we’ll enjoy ^^ Also disclaimer sorry if any characters description is disrespectful in someway shape or form I’m sorry and I’ll fix just leave a comment on what’s wrong with that specific characters description ^^

Character included Technoblade, Dream, George , Sapnap, Philza, Tommyinnit, Wilbur, Quackity, Shlatt, any many more ^^

If your including any other characters you might want to have type who they are and what the wear into the chat bot ^^
creator: Poki_Chan
